import React from 'react'; import { useLanguage } from '../context/LanguageContext'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Card from '../components/ui/Card'; import Button from '../components/ui/Button'; import { Sprout, CreditCard, BookOpen, TrendingUp, CloudSun, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; const Dashboard = () => { const { t } = useLanguage(); const quickActions = [ { title: t('add_crop'), icon: Sprout, path: '/add-crop', color: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600', description: "Log your new harvest" }, { title: t('price_help'), icon: TrendingUp, path: '/price-help', color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-600', description: "Check market trends" }, { title: t('schemes'), icon: BookOpen, path: '/schemes', color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-600', description: "Government subsidies" }, { title: t('payments'), icon: CreditCard, path: '/payments', color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-600', description: "View history" }, ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

{t('project_title')}

Manage your farm operations, access market prices, and stay updated with the latest agricultural schemes—all in one place.

Today's Weather
28°C, Sunny
Market Trend
+5% Growth
{/* Quick Actions Grid */}

Quick Actions

{quickActions.map((action, index) => (

{action.title}

{action.description}

Access Now
))}
{/* Recent Updates / Marketplace Teaser */}

Featured Crops

View Marketplace
{/* Mock Data */} {[1, 2].map((i) => (

Organic Tomato

₹40/kg

Available: 500kg

))}

Next Steps

  • Complete your profile to get personalized scheme recommendations.

  • Check price trends for Potato before verify your listed crop.
); }; export default Dashboard;
